name: io.github.cristianmoroaica/bountyverdict
title: BountyVerdict Agent Decision Tools
description: Read-only GitHub bounty, agent harness, Actions failure, flake, and MCP tool-drift decisions.

useCases: Check one public GitHub bounty before coding
Audit repository instructions before assigning a coding agent
Find the root cause of a failed public GitHub Actions run
Decide whether a failed Actions run should be retried once or fixed
Gate an MCP tools/list update for compatibility and safety regressions

tools.name: check_github_bounty
tools.task: Assess one bounty's claimability and delivery risk
tools.returns: AVOID, CAUTION, or VIABLE with evidence and reuse guidance

tools.name: rank_github_bounties
tools.task: Choose the best of 2-10 bounty issues
tools.returns: Ranked verdicts, best candidate, partial failures, and reuse guidance

tools.name: audit_agent_harness
tools.returns: READY, REVIEW, or REPAIR with commit-pinned findings

tools.name: diagnose_github_actions_run
tools.task: Find why a GitHub Actions run failed
tools.returns: Root-cause verdict, redacted evidence, and next actions

tools.name: classify_github_actions_flake
tools.task: Decide whether to retry once or fix
tools.returns: Flake verdict and ONCE, NO, or NOT_NEEDED retry action

tools.name: check_mcp_tool_drift
tools.returns: Compatibility verdict, accept or block action, and exact hashes
